title: Discovery Center
description: Open to the public, the Discovery Center at Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory offers both in-person and virtual visitors an exciting glimpse into our science and technology. Learn about our exhibits, hours, entry requirements and more.
text:
Discovery Center
A Destination for Inspiration
NIF Target Chamber
Step inside a replica of the National Ignition Facility target chamber to find out how we use the world’s most energetic laser to understand extreme conditions.
Stockpile Stewardship
Learn how LLNL's experiments and predictive simulations ensure that U.S. nuclear weapons are safe, secure and effective without full-scale explosive nuclear testing.
Energy & Climate Science
Hop on our energy bike to learn how much "pedal power" it takes to turn on a lightbulb and get a taste of LLNL's contributions to climate science research.
